calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Vacated

Notice Of Motion Dismiss Appeal Of The Order, Decision Or Award Of The Labor Commissioner
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT CHRISTY FOUNDATION'S MOTION DISMISS APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER. Appearances: John R. Wallace of Jackson & Wallace LLP (650.867.7402) for appellant and responding party; Anne Hipschman (no card provided) for respondent and moving party. Argued and the court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: the parties concede that the court received the appeal timely (August 2, 2010). Appellant to post the required bond by October 1, 2010 or judgment for respondent may be entered. Respondent to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR #5797
